# services.miniflux

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.miniflux`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.miniflux.adminCredentialsFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD (length >= 6) in the format of an EnvironmentFile=, as described by {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. |
| `services.miniflux.config` | `open submodule of attribute set of (string or signed integer)` | Configuration for Miniflux, refer to <https://miniflux.app/docs/configuration.html> for documentation on the supported values. |
| `services.miniflux.config.CREATE_ADMIN` | `signed integer or boolean convertible to it` | Create an admin user from environment variables. |
| `services.miniflux.config.DATABASE_URL` | `null or string` | Postgresql connection parameters. See [lib/pq](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/lib/pq#hdr-Connection_String_Parameters) for more details. |
| `services.miniflux.config.LISTEN_ADDR` | `string` | Address to listen on. Use absolute path for a Unix socket. Multiple addresses can be specified, separated by commas. |
| `services.miniflux.config.RUN_MIGRATIONS` | `signed integer or boolean convertible to it` | Run database migrations. |
| `services.miniflux.config.WATCHDOG` | `signed integer or boolean convertible to it` | Enable or disable Systemd watchdog. |
| `services.miniflux.createDatabaseLocally` | `boolean` | Whether a PostgreSQL database should be automatically created and configured on the local host. If set to `false`, you need provision a database yourself. |
| `services.miniflux.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable miniflux. |
| `services.miniflux.package` | `package` | The miniflux package to use. |
